children.heading: Funding for additional purchases of fruits, vegetables, and nuts
children.label: a Funding for additional purchases of fruits, vegetables, and nuts

children.text: $206,000,000 for fiscal year 2012 and each fiscal year thereafter.

children.heading: Form of purchases
children.label: b Form of purchases
children.text: Fruits, vegetables, and nuts may be purchased under this section in the form of frozen, canned, dried, or fresh fruits, vegetables, and nuts.
